mandatory_claims: UniT achieves state-of-the-art data efficiency and robust out-of-distribution generalization on humanoid simulation benchmark and real-world deployments
UniT enables zero-shot task transfer and direct human-to-humanoid action transfer
required_visuals: t-SNE visualization of human and humanoid features convergence
likely_failures: Kinematic mismatches between human and humanoid data
preventive_checks: Verify UniT's performance on multiple humanoid simulation benchmarks
Evaluate UniT's robustness to varying kinematic conditions
backup_remedies: Use alternative frameworks for human-to-humanoid transfer
Collect additional humanoid data to supplement UniT training
reviewer_focus: UniT's ability to generalize to new tasks and environments
UniT's scalability and efficiency in leveraging human data for humanoid policy learning and world modeling
